attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT       
     SV.AR_TRX_KEY
     FROM
     $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DEFERRED_REVENUE_TRX SV     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN P
    ON SV.PRODUCT_KEY=P.ITEM_KEY  
     WHERE
     SV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
     AND SV.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD IN ('27001') 
     AND SV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ='Y'
     AND SV.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'
     AND ( SV.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD         IN ('INV','DM','CM') 
     OR (SV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY >0 ))
     AND P.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE          = 'SERVICE'
 AND SV.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD  NOT IN ('CSPP_ADJ','CSPP_ANNUITY_ADJ')
	 AND SV.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT IN  (SELECT PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_RR_MONTH_CNTL) /*(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG='Y')*/
	  AND AR_TRX_KEY>0  
      GROUP BY 1
	  
	  UNION 
	  
SELECT       
     SV.AR_TRX_KEY
     FROM
     $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DEFERRED_REVENUE_TRX SV
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF
     ON SV.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT=RF.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
     
       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN P
    ON SV.PRODUCT_KEY=P.ITEM_KEY  
     
     WHERE
     SV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED')
     AND SV.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  IN  ( '27001') 
  AND SV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ='Y'
     AND SV.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'
     AND ( SV.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD         IN ('INV','DM','CM') 
   OR (SV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY >0 )) 
      AND P.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE          = 'SERVICE'
 AND SV.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD  NOT IN ('CSPP_ADJ','CSPP_ANNUITY_ADJ')
	 AND RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN  (SELECT PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_RR_MONTH_CNTL) /*(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG='Y')*/
	   AND AR_TRX_KEY>0  
	 GROUP BY 1
